title: Private and Foundation Funding Sources
content:
Private and foundation funding resources listed by Morgan State ORA on the Funding Sources page:

- Foundation Center — http://foundationcenter.org/ — The Foundation Center (now part of Candid) is the leading source of information about philanthropy worldwide. Researchers use it to identify private foundations and corporate funders aligned with their research and outreach interests.

For strategy advice on approaching foundations and private funders, or to coordinate institutional touchpoints with foundations Morgan already has a relationship with, contact ORA at ask.ora@morgan.edu.
